programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un incendio en un almacén que revela documentos de la Marina desaparecidos, el equipo de NCIS se une a la investigación de la policía de Baltimore, reencontrando a Tony con un joven de su pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: NCIS investiga un incendio en un buque. Se eleva la seguridad en instalaciones navales. DiNozzo y Ziva van a Italia por un dispositivo explosivo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga un dispositivo de espionaje encontrado en un diente de un agente novato, temiendo la filtración de secretos navales.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El terrorismo sacude las bases de la Marina y de NCIS, haciendo que Gibbs y su equipo enfrenten sorpresas devastadoras.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer coordinates a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a vehicle which was reported stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young girl may be the victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop. Officers serve a violation of domestic violence warrant on an inebriated guest at a local hotel.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle tries to force an off-duty deputy off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her husband's potential lover. A hostile man is out-of-control at a local residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control of the vehicle and runs into a stop sign. With the aid of stop sticks, a driver’s car becomes disabled. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a drug house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey on the wrong side of the highway. Officers sets up a reverse sting operation designed to capture a suspected drug dealer. Officers decide to pull over a driver who intentionally avoided a road block.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The victim of the home invasion robbery tells a dispatch operator that a man held him at gun-point. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When one of the officers attempts to grab a suspect, the suspect unexpectedly assaults the officer in an attempt to avoid arrest. An officer responds to a stabbing. An officer is flagged down by a concerned group looking for a missing child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Following a brief pursuit, the desperate driver bails out of the vehicle and flees on foot. An officer responds to an assault call. When a dog owner returns home, she's informed of her dog's mayhem and given a verbal warning and citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph on a local freeway. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a local convenience store. A man threatens an elderly woman at their residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female victim tells the officers that two men kicked in her front door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. Following routine questioning of a petrified wife, officer arrests the husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate driver attempts to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint in front of a local convenience store. Officers coordinate a sting designed to apprehend suspects who patronize prostitutes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chase ends when one of the police units successfully performs a pit maneuver which eventually disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a seemingly fake photo of a dead call girl appears online, the CSIs follow up on a lead to find the woman was actually murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs link a body with severe burn marks to possible execution by the electric chair - and to a legendary Vegas murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A night full of celebration ends with a bang when the director of a scholarship foundation for the deaf is killed by a deadly car bomb, prompting Sara to interrogate the students and faculty of the college where her mother-in-law works.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A thrift store donation turns gruesome when a dead body is found in a box; meanwhile, Langston's wife pays a surprise visit to the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifies against the notorious 'Dick and Jane' killer, Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, Nick receives a call from troubled teen Jason McCann to warn him of impending danger.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are on zombie alert when two men initially pronounced dead mysteriously come back to life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a convicted ex-cop, the CSIs stumble upon a list in his prison cell with names of several individuals he believed might have been his wife's true killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A string of deaths, including a gamer found dead on his couch and a newly divorced man at the bottom of a pool, instigate a bet among the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Sara turn to Lady Heather for help in tracking down the culprit responsible for injuring a woman before she was seemingly mauled to death by a mountain lion.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Following his escape, Nate Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, resurfaces when he e-mails a disturbing video to the father of one of his brides, threatening to take her life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston becomes more determined than ever to track down Nake Haskell, the notorious "Dick & Jane" killer, after discovering that he's kidnapped his ex-wife, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Did Amanda’s fiancé sleep with her cousin? He denies it, but will he change his tune? Is Jimmy cheating on his fiancé Elizabeth? After 17 years of marriage, is Tim cheating on Cathy with her sister?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With My Daughter's Girlfriend
programme.desc: These women are desperate to hear MAURY say the words “YOU ARE THE FATHER!” But these men want to hear him say “YOU ARE NOT THE FATHER!” But only MAURY’s got the results they’re looking for!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Chris cheated and impregnated Lakin's neighbor. He denies he fathered Lakin’s baby. Then, John’s back for a 3rd DNA test. Can Jade prove that he’s the father or is her record 0-3?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un guardia de seguridad desapareció de su puesto sin dejar rastro. Sus restos fueron encontrados un año después en un campamento lejano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Rosemary Anderson es encontrada muerta a un lado de la carretera, su novio se convierte en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vacaciones familiares se convierten en una pesadilla cuando a una mujer la encuentran boca abajo en un lago.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, una agencia federal dictaminó que Terri Strickland había provocado intencionalmente el fuego que mató a su hijo de 17 meses, Josh Hinson.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de un día de pesca en un tranquilo pueblo de Suiza, un adolescente no regresa a casa como se planeó. La investigación revela algunas evidencias microscópicas importantes en el agua cerca de donde fue visto por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2000, Kristine Fitzhugh no se presentó a su clase de música y su esposo Ken la encontró muerta al pie de las escaleras de su casa de Palo Alto. Tras una investigación adicional, el luminol revela evidencia de un asesinato en la cocina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los médicos quedan desconcertados cuando un niño de dos años es trasladado urgentemente al hospital con convulsiones cerebrales y dificultades para respirar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía obtiene una pista sobre una pareja que desapareció en el fin de semana del Día de los Caídos durante un robo en marcha. La evidencia que se encuentra resuelve el brutal crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: The Jackson and Daly swap is what Wife Swap Australia is all about. Both women thought they had things ticking along perfectly in their own homes but the swap made them realise they could do things better.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Karin Wilkinson had a very confronting Wife Swap Australia experience when she swapped lives with Christian wife, Carey Matikainen. Karin felt barely tolerated by her new husband Harry after she revealed to him that her partner was a woman.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Two Australian wives are completely thrown out of their comfort zones as pampered trophy wife, Tanya Driscoll is swapped with hard-­‐working, circus performer Shannon West.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Christian mother of 3 daughters, Yolonda Faber is adamant that her role in life is to be a nurturing mother.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After blacking out, Drew tries to piece together what happened at the party. Clare's new internship means she has less time for Eli, but they can still make it work… right? Maya embarrasses herself at a band audition.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Katie's anger at Drew boils over, she searches for a way to make him suffer. Eli clashes with Becky while planning Degrassi's next play. Meanwhile, a new guy catches Tristan's eye.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew feels like his life is falling apart. Is he upset about losing Bianca, or is something bigger going on? While casting the play, Eli and Becky work to resolve their creative differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig tries to hide the fact that he's poor from Tori. When Eli shares his vision for the musical, Dave isn’t sure he has what it takes to play Romeo. Fiona returns to Degrassi, thrilled to see her girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig will do anything to impress Tori… even steal. Fiona wants Imogen to define their relationship: Are they a couple or not? The hockey team teases Dave about his role in the play.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Alli is offered a scholarship to MIT, her parents are bursting with pride -- but is it the right choice? Meanwhile, Jake decides college isn't for him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli makes a difficult choice about her future. With a little help from Katie, Jake tries to prove himself to his father. Cam snaps at Maya before a big game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna bonds with Becky -- and Becky's hot brother, Luke -- but will religious differences come between them? Clare obsesses over her journalism mentor, Asher. Drew is offered a job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna gets baptized, but did she do it for the wrong reasons? Drew is failing his classes, and considers dropping out of Degrassi. Connor's tweets embarrass Clare in front of Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to impress Asher by pitching a story about Romeo and Jules. K.C. and Bianca play matchmaker for K.C.'s mom. Katie chaperones Maya's date with Cam.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown in cooking up a mess of grits and a pot of polenta.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: Alton Brown ponders the leek, the lesser-known member of the Allium family.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: Fruit can be tricky stuff and that goes double for melons.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he unravels the secrets of oysters.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: Alton Brown simplifies the most common sauce quandaries.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: What could possibly be more chocolaty than chocolate?

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: Alton Brown adapts a fussy French classic for a modern American lifestyle.

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: Does the kabob still have a role to play in the modern culinary carnival?

programme.title: Good Eats
programme.desc: A boy, refusing to eat his peas, has been left at the table a long time.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the Doctor and Sarah to Zeta Minor on the edge of the universe.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: In the universe of antimatter, the Doctor communes with the creature and makes a bargain.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.desc: The Doctor, Sarah and Scorby are hunted down by the mad Harrison Chase.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor tries to win the trust of the savage Sevateem tribe.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers the terrible truth about Xoanon and realizes that he is to blame.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The insane computer Xoanon refuses the Doctor's help and prepares to destroy the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor faces new dangers when searching for the second segment to the Key of Time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Romana has been seized by the Captain and the Doctor attempts to rescue her.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor risks destroying the TARDIS as he tries to defeat the Captain and Queen Xania.

programme.desc: A couple of German shepherd pups with a shadowy obedience track records; a rescue dog with trust issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner is aggressive towards anyone who turns on one of the motorized bikes used to deliver the mail; an aggressive shar-pei; an Australian red cattle dog who barks incessantly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven is arrested; Alexis and Cecil plan to marry; Fallon tells Nick it's over between them; Claudia believes Fallon's baby is her now-deceased daughter Lindsay.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Middle Eastern oilman Farouk, anxious for vengeance against Blake, tells Nick that Carrington is responsible for the death of his brother. Nick attacks Blake, who is left unconscious at the bottom of a deep ravine.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle finds Blake in the mountains and gets him to the hospital. Nick Toscanni disappears. Cecil is also brought to the hospital, and he's very weak. A police investigation is started to find the baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Michael goes to Denver to find out who he is. Alexis and Cecil plan a wedding in the hospital. Claudia disappears and Blake suspects her of kidnapping the baby. There's an exciting drama on the roof of a tall building.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The baby is recovered from the real kidnapper, Alfred Grimes, and it turns out he's the father of Roger Grimes. Fallon fires Susan. Claudia leaves for a sanitarium. Fallon starts looking for a job. Blake gives her his hotel La Mirada.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Cecil leaves his estate and Colbyco to Jeff and Alexis. He also reveals his "Rhinewood" game to Blake at the reading of his will. Blake suspects Alexis of being a part of it.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gives her newfound long-lost son Adam a job at Colbyco. Blake starts to believe that Adam may actually be his real son. Fallon and Adam keep flirting with each other, not knowing they are siblings. Adam has dinner with Krystle and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake tries to be friends with Adam, but Adam rejects him. Alexis tells Mark that he's still married to Krystle. Mark seeks to get a job as a tennis pro at Fallon's hotel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from Congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Indonesia but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Busy Being Born
programme.desc: Few musicians have made an impact throughout the decades as seismic as Bob Dylan. Retrace his journey, from humble folk beginnings in Hibbing, to the bustling electric Greenwich Village.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse: A Final Goodbye (2011)
programme.desc: A Final Goodbye is an intimate look into the life and times of Amy Winehouse. This in-depth program chronicles her rise to pop superstardom and also offers a sensitive portrayal of a transformative star and the inner demons that inspired her work.

programme.title: Parrot Heads
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the world of \"Parrot Heads\", the loyal fan base of Jimmy Buffett.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors

programme.title: Ozzy Osbourne: Throne of Darkness
programme.desc: The Prince of Darkness. Ozzy Osbourne. He is the physical embodiment of Rock and Roll.

programme.title: Kylie Minogue: Showtime

programme.title: Lady Gaga: One Sequin at a Time
programme.desc: Lady Gaga- the worlds most talented and controversial pop star. Born and raised in New York City, Gaga started as an aspiring pianist and songwriter, having taught herself to play the piano at a very young age.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Glory Days
programme.desc: Bruce Frederick Joseph Springsteen, more fondly known as 'The Boss' by his millions of fans, is widely regarded as one of the most influential songwriters of the 20th century and one of the greatest artists of all time. This is his remarkable story.

programme.title: Fleetwood Mac: Unbroken Chain (12004)
programme.desc: Fleetwood Mac: Unbroken Chain tells the complete story of this amazing group through interviews, film clips, and rare photographs, from the band's early days as a British Blues powerhouse, to its rebirth as a worldwide phenomenon.

programme.title: Bieber Generation
programme.desc: This documentary film attempts to analyze the dynamics of a massive fan-base; it focuses on the Beliebers (fans of Justin Bieber).

programme.title: Post Malone: On His Terms
programme.desc: For reasons unknown Post Malone changed his last name to his first name, then chose his surname from a rap generator. See how he went on to sell 80 million records and win 10 Billboard Music Awards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An old man who supposedly knows the secret to Hitler's legacy lives in East Germany within the Berlin Wall. Lupin and his gang track the old man down, but the old man can't recall anything about any legacy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: At Loch Ness in Scotland, the mysterious monster Nessie reveals itself from the lake, charmed by Fujiko's singing. Seeing this, Doctor Oz decides to use Fujiko to capture Nessie for his personal gain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko and a mystery man have an enticing job for Lupin: Stealing a ton of gold bullion from a Swiss Bank, a bank renowned for its tight security. Can it be done? What is the mystery man's true identity?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A man is threatening to destroy the Leaning Tower of Pisa with a device that generates artificial earthquakes. The Italian government has no choice but to meet the culprit's, but Lupin takes the ransom for himself!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From the Pharos of Alexandria to modern automated buoys, lighthouse history features personal stories of keepers, daring construction, and optical discoveries; today these structures become inns and retreats as navigation advances.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en el estanque de Rancio porque Perro orina en la pierna del perrero. / Perro y Gato buscan un alma gemela para Tito porque piensan que, si se enamora, dejará de atormentarlos.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog

programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: Beastmaster

programme.title: Beastmaster
programme.desc: Callista convinces Dar's brother to stake a claim on Eldar's throne, all so she can win favor with Balcifer.

programme.title: Beastmaster
programme.desc: Zad orders the maker of the Sword of Eldar to make a Sword of Balcifer.

programme.title: Beastmaster

programme.title: Beastmaster

programme.title: Beastmaster

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A wealthy trader and father of four is gunned-down at home while his family is tied up in a closet; police dig into affairs, mob links and a missing co-worker, until a new lead and a taped phone call reveal a plot decades later.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young mother is found dead in a field after a night out, police scour security video to retrace a suspect's steps; the discovery of a second crime scene leads to an arrest, before high-tech forensics reveal a truth no one expected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A cat-loving and recently divorced young woman dipping her toes back in the dating game is beaten and strangled in a brutal and unusual way; investigators dive into the murky world of online dating to hunt a killer who could be ready to strike again.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Detectives discover the badly beaten body of a single young woman left bizarrely staged on her bed; fear in the community grows amid a rash of nearby murders until police are handed a break when a fresh look at old evidence points to the killer.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A beloved teacher and mother of four silently vanishes in the middle of the night; a blood-soaked bedroom and lakeside discovery point police to a killer close to home until mysterious tracks in the mud lead to a culprit no one suspected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a loving father of two is gunned down on his driveway, police uncover a hidden affair and workplace grudges before a nervous witness and chilling confession reveal a vicious vendetta from a killer no one expected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a family that runs a beloved vet clinic is gunned down, police investigate disgruntled tenants, a pet owner with an ax to grind and an estranged son; the case stalls until detectives uncover a twisted plot by someone who seemed above suspicion.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young mother and beloved coworker is found stabbed in her bedroom, investigators are unable to pin down a killer until secret recordings and evidence stashed in a van are found.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: An execution-style shooting of a well-loved, self-made couple; early leads take police down a path of greed and desperation until a paper trail leads to a calculated betrayal shockingly close to home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After a Texas mother is found murdered in an office bathroom, her husband admits a disturbing past while police chase down a serial killer; the case goes cold until an oversight leads to a surprise suspect and an FBI manhunt south of the border.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a devoted mother vanishes from home, a series of grisly roadside discoveries take police on a hunt for a killer; detectives follow a path of greed and desperation until a shocking twist leads to a culprit with a bizarre motive.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When an outgoing college student is gunned down, police investigate disapproving roommates, a psychic and an infamous serial killer; decades-old evidence reveals a killer that original detectives had previously overlooked.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a devoutly religious couple, police uncover dark family secrets, leading them to a shocking suspect.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a popular college student is found slain in the middle of campus, police suspect his friends and lovers might be involved.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a suburban mom is murdered in her own home, investigators chase down an elusive killer that no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre con picazón por la exposición al roble venenoso resulta que también tiene gusanos excavando en una herida en su espalda; una mujer joven tiene un labio sangrante.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un niño de siete años fue atropellado por un camión. Cuando un adolescente llega a la sala de emergencias y dice estar repentinamente paralizado en las piernas, el Dr. Armand Dorian no sabe qué hacer con la situación.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña, recientemente golpeada por un disco de hockey, ahora está misteriosamente paralizada de cintura para abajo; un joven se queja de un terrible dolor de cabeza.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una tortuga caimán mordedora está sujeta al cuello de un hombre y no la suelta; un médico de emergencias corre contra un huracán inminente; y un podador de árboles está a 20 pies sobre el suelo cuando es atravesado por su motosierra.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una trabajadora del hospital siente que se está muriendo; el hijo pequeño de un médico es un paciente en su propia sala de emergencias; el pasatiempo de una mujer de recolectar hongos silvestres la envía a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos deben decidir si hacer un agujero en la cabeza de un adolescente que tiene un trauma grave en la cabeza para aliviar la presión, o esperar más ayuda.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer corre el riesgo de perder un dedo después de probarse un anillo de compromiso que no le queda bien; un culturista no puede respirar y los médicos se sorprenden al descubrir por qué.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El muslo de una mujer está atravesado con un trozo de barra de refuerzo; un hombre lleva a su novia a la sala de emergencias para un estudio de ETS, y ella es la paciente más extraña que el médico haya visto en su vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos realizan una incisión en el pecho mientras esperan a los cirujanos; Se introduce una iguana después de un accidente automovilístico.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un joven adolescente pierde el control de sus brazos y piernas en una pijamada y tiene que ser tratado en la sala de emergencias; una mujer recibe un tiro en la pierna en su propia fiesta de despedida de soltera.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos pacientes ingresan en la sala de emergencias, ambos experimentan convulsiones; el pulmón de un anciano se derrumba, y su joven esposa y su hija pelean por él.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una médica de urgencias embarazada está en peligro por un paciente violento aparentemente invencible; un dolor de cabeza inexplicable resulta potencialmente mortal.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña entra a la sala de emergencias y no puede moverse de la cintura para abajo. Sus padres están enojados cuando los médicos la enviaron a su casa una semana antes.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Berry Bitty City holds an election to see who will fill in as 'BerryFest Princess' while Princess Berrykin is absent.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Rex (Neil Roberts) gets Prue (Shannen Doherty) a locket that harbors the evil warlock Matthew (guest star Matthew Tate), Matthew takes Prue’s powers and sets out for the other sisters.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Rex (guest star Neil Roberts) and Hannah (guest star Leigh- Allyn Baker) set out to destroy the sisters Halliwell and frame Prue (Shannen Doherty) for murder while angering her by Rex dating Phoebe (Alyssa Milano).

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe’s old flame Clay comes to town after he and his partners steal a valuable urn that is guarded by a demon, putting Prue in jeopardy after Clay gets Phoebe to ask Prue to help sell the urn.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is almost killed by a beast, she notices a strange transformation she begins to make – all similar traits to her attacker. Meanwhile, Phoebe works as Prue’s assistant and tries to help a family reunite after a premonition.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: On the eve of another Friday the 13th, the sisters learn of a demon (guest star Billy Drago) who kills witches after discovering their deepest fears. Now, he’s after Prue (Shannen Doherty) since discovering her fear of water.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help a young boy (guest star David Netter), who’s received his mother’s witch powers after two thugs (guest stars Brad Tatum and Will Stewart) kidnap him to use his powers for their evil gain.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An earthquake unearths a shadowy evil Woogy who promptly takes over the gasman on the Halliwell premises who promptly takes over Phoebe, who as a child most feared the Woogyman the girls’ grandma always talked about.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A dangerous mortal (guest star Alex McArthur) uses a crystal sword to suck powers out of people and targets Prue (Shannen Doherty) as his next victim. To help combat him, Prue casts a spell to strengthen her powers, only it ends up cloning her twice.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After a run in with a demon who’s responsible for the death of the sisters’ mother, Prue, Piper and Phoebe are transported back to the 1970’s after casting a spell to try to prevent her death and their loss of powers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help Brendan (guest star Michael Weatherly) who’s two brothers (guest stars David Kriegel and Nick Kokotakis) are evil warlocks that attempt to convert him as well, forming the Evil Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After the Halliwell sisters witness the kidnapping of Piper’s (Holly Marie Combs) friend (guest star Maureen Muldoon) son (guest star Scott Tera), they discover it’s the work of the Grimlocks, demons who take the sight away from young boys.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper leaves town for a convention, Prue and Phoebe discover a long-dead convict has been brought to life as a ghost and is murdering people who had anything to do with his conviction.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: White-Lighter Leoeturns to help rescue Daisy, a young woman on her way to becoming a White Lighter, he’s injured by the evil Alex, who once loved and is now out to get Daisy.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After repeated, unsuccessful attempts at trying to get to the Charmed Ones, Rodriguez (guest star Carlos Gomez) is aided by time sorcerer Tempus Fugit (guest star David Carradine) who traps the Halliwells in a time loop.

programme.desc: Norma recibe atención médica, todos piensan que sufre una crisis nerviosa, pero el doctor anuncia los resultados de sus análisis. Fernando estalla, los trámites del divorcio toman otro rumbo.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Creyendo que Valeria y Pablo están juntos, Francisco se plantea la posibilidad de casarse con Paula. Belinda le pide a Pablo que la reconozca legalmente y Marcia se deshace del inspector.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria busca a Francisco, pero llega Paula y le da las buenas nuevas, provoca un enfrentamiento que se torna violento. Miguel hace una advertencia, necesita garantizar su seguridad.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Francisco acepta la oferta de Paula, cree que le dará una lección a Marcia. Pablo se mantiene cerca de Valeria al patrocinar su proyecto. Belinda promete portarse mejor con su madre.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Francisco prefiere tomar medidas, no confía en Marcia y decide que todo quede por escrito. José María sospecha de Marcia y él no es el único que duda de ella. Valeria dejará la vinatería.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La noche tiene mucha seducción entre Verónica y Alejandro. David se presenta ante Verónica y le dice que le recuerda a su madre, a quién desprecia. Ella disimula cuánto le afecta el comentario. Antonia quiere matar poco a poco a la abuela de Valentina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica logra despistar a David, pero cuando él se va, ella se viene abajo. La nueva Patrona atrae el interés de todos y Antonia está furiosa al ver que sus aliados la ignoran, incluyendo su amante. Verónica consigue que Alberto se ponga de su lado.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia se presenta en la casa de Verónica para declararle la guerra y la trata como si fuera Gabriela. Dantés la reta a desenterrar los restos de la minera muerta. La patrona Guerra acepta, pero Alejandro se opone rotundamente a la exhumación.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia y Verónica hacen las paces tras confirmarse que el cadáver en la tumba corresponde a Gabriela Suárez. Ricardo le confiesa su problema de impotencia a Alejandro, al tiempo que le reclama el daño que le ha hecho a Patricia. Macario queda libre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo están desconsoladas y Juan se desespera porque no hay noticias de su hermano. Óscar y Jimena encuentran ayuda al atravesar el desierto, se preguntan si se trata de una alucinación.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth se emociona por el regreso de Óscar e invita a los hermanos Reyes a cenar, ellos no pueden resistirse y se conmueven al recordar a Libia. Jimena cuenta cómo sobrevivió al secuestro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan se desahoga con Norma, él no aguanta más y le pide que lo acompañe para resolver la situación a su manera. Rosario y Franco discuten por el incidente del bar, él le propone matrimonio.
