programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Several teams come together and target one set of Racers at the double U-turn in Italy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Venice, Italy where one team reaches a breaking point in a frantic search for a water taxi.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A poor farmer successfully auditions to sing at a concert. Barney and Andy take it upon themselves to spruce him up for the event.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie meets a spoiled youngster and decides his own allowance should be tripled.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses common sense and Barney uses modern criminal detection methods to solve several burglaries at a filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff's knowledge of American history is put to the test by Opie and an attractive new history teacher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee falls for the sales pitch of a fast-talking medicine man and his Indian elixir.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff has his hands full as a clan of mountain musicians descend on Mayberry to meet a bus.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An English tourist works off his reckless driving fine by being a valet and chauffeur for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie suffers from puppy love so Barney attempts to show him how to handle women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney decides that it's time to push Andy into matrimony, but Barney's marriage bureau collapses at a frantic dinner party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A pack of hunting dogs overruns the Mayberry Courthouse just as Andy is trying to impress a visiting state official.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife becomes super-efficient in executing his duties as a deputy sheriff after two thieves are jailed in Mayberry until their accomplices are captured.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a bird with a slingshot and becomes foster-mother to her three young birds.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, Barney and Gomer are a trio of laughs as they tread the boards of a haunted house.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Guest star Howard Morris plays the part of a mountain man very disgruntled with being rejected by the army.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher urges the residents of Mayberry to relax and enjoy the simple pleasures of life--leading to more work for all.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee is the unwilling object of matrimony when mountaineer Briscoe Darling comes a'courting.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gossiping Gomer Pyle moves in with the sheriff when he loses his job and home at the filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ron Howard's real-life father and younger brother appear as Mayberry gets involved with a gold shipment en route to Fort Knox.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie seems in line for a new bicycle as he comes home with an all A report card.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife plays cupid for Gomer when Barney's girl refuses to go to a dance unless her cousin also has a date.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is evicted from his rooming house for illegal cooking and moves into the Mayberry sheriff's office backroom much to Andy's chagrin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tickets Gomer for a U-turn and is then detained in a citizen's arrest by Gomer for the same thing.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his chums take their roles as Robin Hood and his merry men seriously as they befriend a hobo at the expense of the pantries of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie learns a lesson in friendship when he befriends a newcomer to Mayberry.

programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a breathtaking, misty wooded scene with tiny trickling creek that's fast and easy to recreate.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.desc: Shane y Otis están atrapados por los zombis en la escuela adonde acudieron por el material sanitario necesario para operar a Carl. En la granja, surgen las primeras tensiones y Daryl y Andrea vuelven a salir en busca de Sophie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane regresa a la granja con las medicinas, pero el sacrificio que he tenido que cometer no es bien visto por el resto del grupo. En la granja, el grupo intenta sacar a un zombi del pozo de agua fresca antes de que la infecte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras busca a Sophia, Daryl sufre un accidente que lo deja perdido y herido en el bosque. La tensión entre el grupo y los propietarios de la granja aumenta, así como la inestabilidad del propio grupo, debido a que Shane desafía a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la familia mantiene encerrada a sus familiares convertidos en zombis en el granero, Dale confronta a Hershel. Lori, por su parte, confiesa a Rick que está embarazada y los problemas entre los integrantes del grupo se intensifican.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn le revela a todo el grupo el secreto del granero, pero no están de acuerdo sobre cómo actuar: Rick ordena respetar la autoridad de Hershel, aunque Shane quiere acabar con los zombis. Por otra parte, descubren por fin qué le ha pasado a Sophia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hershel no soporta lo ocurrido y recae en su alcoholismo, pero Rick y Glenn lo siguen hasta la ciudad para evitar que muera. Entretanto, Beth, incapaz de aceptar todo lo que le está sucediendo a su familia, entra en estado catatónico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Lori sale en busca de Rick, pero lo único que encuentra es un peligro mortal y Shane va tras ella. Entretanto, Rick, Hershel y Glenn mantienen un tiroteo con los desconocidos con quienes cruzaron sus caminos en el bar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La tensión entre Rick y Shane aumenta y la decisión sobre el destino de Randall es el detonante: Shane quiere matarlo, Rick prefiere dejarlo vivo. Mientras, Beth pretende suicidarse y Andrea, quien debe vigilarla, no cumple con su cometido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre que Randall es un violador y asesino y acuerdan ejecutarlo, pero Dale se opone porque eso los convertiría también en criminales. Mientras tanto, Carl comete un error que acarreará consecuencias imprevistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West vows to destroy Raven, an organization that induces influential citizens to commit sabotage through mind conditioning.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An Army sergeant's letter to President Grant sends agents West and Gordon to a lonely outpost to fight a gang of terrorists.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West aids a Russian prince in recovering an all-important icon, sought also by a desperate, dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent James T. West is exposed to a deadly plague when he tries to rescue a governor's daughter from a band of stagecoach robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The board of directors of a corporation owned by a spinsterish tycoon appears to be the target of an insidious plot.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Masquerading as a polished gunfighter with a dishonorable discharge from the Army, James T. West arrives in Quemada, New Mexico, in a plush private railroad carwith orders from President Ulysses S. Grant to quell the terrorist activities.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless, a dwarf, watches his giant assistant, Voltaire, subdue a dock guardas he (Loveless) pre-pares to kill disembarking Prof. Neilsen, arriving to present his formula for a new explosive to the U.S.government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Four men, aided by a guard named Foxx, gain entrance to the U.S. Mint in Carson City and connect a hose to a street gaslight in order to asphyxiate three workers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man from the Attorney General's office in Washington is killed while attempting to take the wanted John Avery into custody, so secret agent James T.West is assigned to the task.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin sees the installation of a new gutter and how Roger is restoring a patch of lawn to nature. An electrician updates the wiring while Norm visits a window factory in New Hampshire.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: LED strips are installed in the kitchen. Richard reviews the need for insulation, and wallpaper is put up in the girl’s rooms. Kevin finds a painter painting decorative stripes on a wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger places new plants while Richard installs two types of radiators to heat the garage and sitting room. A chandelier and garage door is fitted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs new turf while Kevin meets with inspectors. The design of the entertainment center is finalized. Richard exhibits the finished mechanical room and heating system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Tom meet the Building Commissioner to see if they passed inspection. Richard and Kevin tour the new kitchen and spaces above the garage. Tom joins to celebrate another job well done.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin learns that Matt DeWitt's disability doesn't limit his cycling passion. Richard sees the home’s ADA requirements. Kevin meets the Dillmanns. Richard learns about touchless faucet technology.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger, Tom, and Norm build a greenhouse. Locals help out at the DeWitt project. Kevin meets a vet in Florida. Norm makes a rustic table and a closet.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A homeowner inherits her childhood home but wants to accommodate their children and in-laws. Mike Rowe visits to discuss the need for a new generation of skilled tradespeople.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom finishes the forms for the new foundation. Richard gets the house safe for demolition. Roger saves roses and lilacs from being trampled by construction. Mold is found in the basement.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin checks on the foundations at the site. The homeowners request an open floor plan and enlist an interior designer. Tommy and Kevin discuss the future of their apprentices on the Newton site.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Tom build a new subfloor. Richard hunts for an old clawfoot tub. Tom demonstrates how to check porch level and build a hip roof. Kevin learns about a job training program in Baltimore.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices learn the basics of framing a deck while the chimney gets demo'ed. The interior designer creates a custom pattern for the floor. The flue for the wood burning stove is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices learn how to frame a wall in the master bedroom, build a drain stack for the master bath, and lay decking on the front porch. The homeowners visit their kitchen cabinet designer.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Flooring is used to make a barn door. Roger teaches a horticulture class. Tommy and Charlie find an uninsulated crawl space. The garage floor gets radiant heat and the front porch gets columns.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices get a lesson in roofing, Kevin watches how an elaborate Chippendale railing is put together, the basement gets moisture prevention, and Richard shows how ductwork is put together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin reviews the progress being made upstairs. Most of the new work is at the back of the house. New gas lines are installed. Tommy builds a shower bench and double hung replacement windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Granite is laid for the stove. Nathan installs a porch ceiling. Kevin sees a Rhode Island home with pine trim. Richard reviews component placement at the mechanical wall. Mauro fixes holes in plaster.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: At the Newton Project, trim interior columns, stair treads, and stained-glass windows are installed. Kevin tours a flooring factory. Richard teaches a plumbing class.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm fits an old door. Roger sees a premade stone wall installed in sections. Kevin visits a career day for the trades. Twin built-in beds are made in Rhode Island. Tommy reinstalls a corner cabinet.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger explains why preventative tree work is needed. Homeowner Liz gets a tiling lesson. The original newel post is discovered to be walnut. The apprentices graduate after ten weeks of hard work.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm lays composite decking. Charlie makes exterior decorative brackets. Kevin watches a quartz countertop get installed. Roger paves the front walk. Liz fits her stained-glass window.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds Tommy and Charlie installing a fireback. Roger returns the flowers he saved. The island countertop goes on. Kevin watches a crew install a garage door. The wood stove arrives.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's the wrap of another great project. Kevin tours the renovated house with the homeowners. Their kids and Joe's parents arrive to check out the new and improved home.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Shane Mosley
programme.desc: On November 10th. 2007 Miguel Cotto fought Shane Mosley at Madison Square Garden in New York City for the WBA World welterweight title in a full 12 round bout that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Mikaela Mayer vs Ewa Brodnicka
programme.desc: On October 31st, 2020 Mikaela Mayer fought Ewa Brodnicka for the vacant WBO World Super Featherweight due to Brodnicka being overweight and losing her title on the scale but Mayer was able to claim the victory by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Mikaela Mayer vs Maiva Hamadouche
programme.desc: On November 5th, 2021 Mikaela Mayer faced Maiva Hamadouche for the IBF and WBO World Super Featherweight title the 10 round bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for Mayer.

programme.title: Mike Alvarado vs Brandon Rios 2
programme.desc: On March 30th, 2013, Mike Alvarado fought Brandon Rios for the WBO Light Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In the rematch, Alvarado avenged his loss by earning a unanimous decision victory in an absolute battle.

programme.title: Mike Tyson vs Henry Tillman
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 Mike Tyson defeated Henry Tillman at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a bout supposed to last ten rounds but ended after one in a quick win for Tyson.

programme.title: Mike Tyson vs Lorenzo Canady
programme.desc: On August 15th, 1985 Mike Tyson and Lorenzo Canady fought eachother at Resorts International in Atlantic City that resulted in Tyson defeating Canady in the first round by Knockout.

programme.title: Mike Weaver vs John Tate
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1990 Mike Weaver fought John Tate at the Stokley Athletics Center in Knoxville in a 15 round bout for the WBA World heavyweight title that ended by knockout in the 15th round securing the victory for Weaver.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 1
programme.desc: On February 18th, 1995 Montell Griffin faced James Toney for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the IBF Inter-continental Light Heavyweight title with the bout ending with a majority decision win for Griffin.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 2
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1996 Montell Griffin and James Toney fought for a second time at the Lawlor Events Center in Reno for World Light Heavyweight titles resulting in an unanimous decision win for Griffin.

programme.desc: Brandi must defend Malaysia's behavior to "sister" Duffey. Malaysia and Angel Brinks attempt to put their feud to rest. Angel Brinks holds a launch party for her clothing line, but drama threatens to derail the event. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Angel Brinks plans her clothing line anniversary party but it turns into a circus. Tami and Duffey collaborate on Jazz's music video but their visions don't match. Doug breaks the news to Jackie that he is taking a coaching position. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Angel Brinks hosts a star-studded event for the anniversary of her clothing company but Jackie's erratic behavior makes it a night to remember. Tami and Reggie visit a fertility doctor, and Jackie seeks the advice of an energy healer. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie's display at Angel Brinks's party causes a rift. Brandi and Duffey plan a BBQ to get to the bottom of Jackie's behavior. Tami confronts Duffey about her daughter's music video and makes a drastic decision. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Tami fires Duffey from her daughter's music video. Angel Brinks and Angel Love have it out with Jackie after her breakdown at Angel Brinks's party. Tami hustles to finish her daughter's music video in time for the release party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Tami gets some scandalous information from a friend. Jackie tries to lose weight in order to keep Doug interested. At Tami's daughter's video release party, Angel Brinks gets blindsided and Jackie finds herself in the line of fire. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie asks Malaysia to be by her side during a very personal weight loss procedure. Duffey apologizes to Tami's daughter in an attempt to make things right with Tami. Doug takes Jackie on a romantic date and reveals a huge surprise. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: As the ladies all prepare for their trip to Portugal, Malaysia attempts to broker a peace between Tami and Duffey. Soon after her arrival, Duffey has second thoughts about her decision to come on the trip. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The ladies explore Portugal and try to relax, but the tension between Duffey and Tami has everyone on edge. Jackie fears the worst when she can't get ahold of Doug. Tami finally confronts Duffey in an explosive showdown. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: After Tami and Duffey fight, Jackie must decide which one of them can stay and which one must return home. The results of a pregnancy test threaten to change everything for Tami. Doug surprises Jackie with a dream wedding in Portugal. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: While helping Goomer with a bully at his gym, Sam knocks out an MMA champion.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat try to avoid getting in trouble when they accidentally knock out musician Del DeVille.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat takes Dice to a hair modeling job in Arizona; Sam is stuck at home with Nona for a weekend roommate.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The Cast introduces bloopers and outtakes from the series.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.title: Victorious: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.

programme.title: Victorious: Sleepover at Sikowitz's
programme.desc: Sikowitz invites the gang to have a sleepover at his house in order to teach them a lesson in method acting.

programme.title: Victorious: The Wood
programme.desc: The kids are excited to hear that they'll be the stars of a new reality show being filmed at Hollywood Arts. Meanwhile, Trina and Robbie are forced to work at The Grub Truck after injuring Festus.

programme.title: Victorious: The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: Victorious: Wok Star
programme.desc: Tori agrees to help Jade find a theater to perform a play Jade wrote. But when the sponsor demands changes that will ruin Jade's play, Tori has to make things right before opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Survival of the Hottest
programme.desc: A heat wave hits LA and the gang heads for the beach in Beck's RV. But once there, they find themselves trapped inside the RV as the temperature rises. Oblivious, Cat parties it up with some cute boys.

programme.title: Victorious: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed, leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat, but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly suspects that her new boyfriend, Steven, is cheating on her with Tori Vega, so the gang plans a trip to Los Angeles to catch him in the act at a party thrown by Andre at Kenan Thompson's house.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly gets invited to be guests of honor at WebiCon, but when the fans start asking questions that are too personal, things quickly gets out of hand. Spencer does battle with a costumed nemesis.
